channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On a testé le SUV électrique qui cartonne en Europe : que vaut le Skoda Elroq 60 dans sa version « premier prix » ?
item.description: Belle finition, grosse batterie, le plein d'options... Nos essais de nouvelles voitures se font régulièrement avec les modèles les plus haut de gamme et, par conséquent, les plus onéreux. Tout le monde n'ayant pas un budget extensible, ni les mêmes besoins, nous avons choisi d'essayer la meilleure vente électrique en Europe de ces derniers mois, à savoir le Skoda Elroq, dans sa version quasiment la plus basique. Décryptage. ...

item.title: What we’re listening to, watching, and reading right now.
item.description: There is so much art out there that it’s absolutely impossible to keep up. Whether it’s a slept-on post-punk album from the ‘80s, a new sci-fi novel, or a cult classic horror movie, we’re always finding new obsessions here at The Verge — and we want to share those obsessions with you. Sometimes that might […]

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, March 9 (game #1002)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, March 9 (game #736)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: I almost walked away with a new iPad until Apple unveiled the MacBook Neo — these are 5 reasons why I think the Neo is the better option
item.description: Apple's new MacBook Neo is the entry-level laptop I've always wanted, and it's just altered my plans to upgrade to iPad.

item.title: Explainable AI is making black box models worthless in the agentic era
item.description: Transparency and explainability are only way organizations can trust autonomous AI.

item.title: OpenAI's robotics hardware lead resigns following deal with the Department of Defense
item.description: OpenAI's robotics hardware lead is out. Caitlin Kalinowski, who oversaw hardware within the robotics division of OpenAI, posted on X that she was resigning from her role, while criticizing the company's haste in partnering with the Department of Defense without investigating proper guardrails. OpenAI told Engadget that there are no plans to replace Kalinowski. Kalinowski, who previously worked at Meta before leaving to join OpenAI in late 2024, wrote on X that "surveillance of Americans without judicial oversight and lethal autonomy without human authorization are lines that deserved more deli...

item.title: ‘Dorohedoro’ Brings More Chaos With Season 2 in April
item.description: Mappa finally returns to the world of 'Dorohedoro' next month and with more platforms for everyone to watch it on.

item.title: Au fond du lit ou en bord de mer, cette liseuse étanche et équipé d’un mode nuit s’emporte partout pour à peine plus de 200 euros
item.description: La Kobo Monza est une liseuse vendue pour 204,17 euros chez PC Componentes grâce à cette réduction de 5 %. Malgré un prix inférieur à celui des cadors du marché, cette liseuse est intéressante avec son mode sombre et son écran tactile.

item.title: Best Buy is throwing in a free gift card with the new MacBook Neo
item.description: Get a $25 Best Buy gift card with every purchase of the new MacBook Neo.

item.title: The best Switch 2 controller just got better (and a little worse)
item.description: Crowning the EasySMX S10 the best Switch 2 controller last fall was easy. The $60 wireless gamepad, which is often well below $50, mimics or improves on many of the $90 Switch 2 Pro controller's best features. The S10 has great-feeling rumble in games, TMR joysticks that will last longer than Nintendo's, plus amiibo support, […]

item.title: 'Initially we were concerned, but I think it's helpful': new Pixar movie Hoppers is 'nothing like' Zootopia 2 — but could be just as successful
item.description: Before Hoppers came along, wildly successful Zootopia 2 introduced a brand-new beaver — but the overlap has 'never worried' director Daniel Chong.

item.title: I tested LG’s most hardcore Dolby Atmos FlexConnect setup, and it works like a dream — but is it really worth buying all this?
item.description: The LG Immersive Quad Suite is one of the most immersive sound systems I’ve ever tested, but I still wouldn’t recommend it to everyone — here’s why.

item.title: ChatGPT has delayed the roll out of its adult mode again: 'Getting the experience right will take more time'
item.description: We're going to be waiting a while yet for the promised adult mode to make an appearance in ChatGPT.
